hero.eyebrow: Senior finance teams · Crafted in Ceylon
hero.headingLead: A senior finance leader who owns your numbers —
hero.body: We embed a controller, FP&A lead, or accounting manager full-time in your business — to own your month-end close, reporting, and controls. You get the judgment, ownership, and seniority of a senior in-house hire, without the search, the ramp, or the risk of getting your numbers wrong.
hero.tagline: We don't recruit finance operators. We've been them.
hero.note: No long lock-in. Every match starts on a trial.
hero.benchNote: Hand-selected for your business in about two weeks.

problems.title: A strong controller runs six figures
problems.body: The best finance leaders command six figures, and they are hard to find, harder to keep, and slow to hire.

problems.title: Offshore usually means bookkeeping
problems.body: Most providers give you junior transaction processing, not ownership of the month-end close, the controls, or the reporting.

problems.title: You should not overpay for judgment
problems.body: The senior finance talent you want already exists. It is simply in the wrong place, at the wrong price.

differences.title: Finance is all we place
differences.body: We place finance leaders and nothing else. No assistants, no marketing pool, no junior staff with a senior title.

differences.title: Built by people who have run finance themselves
differences.body: The people who built Satinwood Talent trained at Deloitte, Ernst & Young, Goldman Sachs, and Stanford, and have scaled finance functions themselves. We hire for that.

differences.title: From one seat to a full finance function
differences.body: Start with the role you need most, a controller or an FP&A lead, and scale to a full outsourced finance function at the same senior standard as you grow.

differences.title: Embedded like a teammate
differences.body: Embedded, exclusive, full-time, and fluent in modern finance tools and AI. They own outcomes the way a teammate does.

roles.name: Controller
roles.body: Owns the close, the controls, the reporting package, and the integrity of your numbers.

roles.name: FP&A Lead
roles.body: Budgets, forecasts, board decks, and the analysis behind every decision.

roles.name: Accounting Manager
roles.body: Runs the day-to-day function, reconciliations, AP and AR, and the monthly cadence.

roles.name: Senior Accountant
roles.body: Hands-on ownership of the ledger, journals, and clean, investor-ready books.

caseStudy.desc: CPG brand across major North American retailers, including Costco, Loblaws, and Amazon.
caseStudy.quote: I stopped doing the books and started running the business. The numbers are cleaner than they have ever been.

blocks.label: The problem
blocks.body: Finance ran on the founder. Month-end, retailer deductions and chargebacks, GL coding, and investor reporting all landed on one person. It did not scale, and the numbers were always a step behind.

blocks.label: The solution
blocks.body: Flourish embedded a Satinwood Talent controller and a senior accountant. They took ownership of the close, reconciliations, retailer settlements, and the monthly reporting pack, running it inside the company's own tools.

caseStudy.outcome: A finance function that runs without the founder, with cleaner books and faster reporting, for a fraction of a local hire.

testimonials.quote: Our controller owns the close end to end. I stopped checking the numbers months ago. That is the highest compliment I can give.
testimonials.name: Founder

testimonials.quote: We were paying a US firm three times as much for less ownership. The judgment we get now is what we were missing.
testimonials.name: Operating Partner

steps.title: Discovery
steps.body: We learn your close, your stack, your reporting cadence, and the seat you actually need filled.

steps.title: Match
steps.body: We hand-select a senior operator for your business. A considered match, not a stack of resumes.

steps.title: Embed
steps.body: A structured 90-day onboarding into your tools, your team, and your monthly rhythm.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Scale from one seat to a full finance function, at the same standard, as you grow.

craftPoints.title: Operator-built
craftPoints.body: Run by people who own finance functions, so we hire for judgment and ownership, not keywords on a resume.

craftPoints.title: Finance-only bar
craftPoints.body: One vetting standard, built for finance. No generalist pool to dilute it.

craftPoints.title: Modern and AI-fluent
craftPoints.body: Fluent in QuickBooks, NetSuite, Xero, and the AI tools that now run alongside them.

craftPoints.title: Retained, not rented
craftPoints.body: Real career paths mean our people stay, so your finance function has memory.

reassurances.title: Time-zone overlap
reassurances.body: Real working hours that overlap your day, agreed up front, so the close never waits.

reassurances.title: Data security
reassurances.body: Secure devices, NDAs, access controls, and clear handling standards for financial data.

reassurances.title: Trial and replacement
reassurances.body: Start on a trial. If it is not the right fit, we replace the match. The risk is ours.

reassurances.title: Flexible terms
reassurances.body: Rolling engagement, scale up or down. No multi-year lock-in to get started.

faqs.a: Satinwood Talent is a senior finance talent firm. We embed finance operators from Sri Lanka full-time and exclusively in your business to own the close, reporting, and controls, for a fraction of building the same seat at home. We serve growing companies in the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, the United Arab Emirates, and Australia, placing controller, FP&A, accounting manager, and senior accountant level talent. We are not a staffing marketplace or a bookkeeping provider.

faqs.q: How is Satinwood Talent different from other offshore finance providers and staffing marketplaces?
faqs.a: Satinwood Talent places senior finance operators only, never generalists. Most offshore providers are generalist marketplaces staffing assistants, marketers, and junior bookkeepers from a shared pool. We place finance and nothing else, we are run by people who own finance functions themselves, and we are delivered with MAC Holdings, an established Sri Lankan group, not a venture-backed app.

An outsourced controller is a senior finance professional who owns your month-end close, reconciliations, financial controls, and reporting from outside your local payroll. With Satinwood Talent the controller is embedded full-time in your business and tools, so you get ownership of the numbers, not a task queue. It is the same seniority as a local controller, at a fraction of the cost.

faqs.q: How much does an outsourced controller cost?
faqs.a: An embedded, controller-level operator typically costs a fraction of a comparable local hire — often [40–60%] less, starting from [$X per month]. The exact figure depends on the role and scope, and we walk you through the numbers on a short discovery call.

faqs.q: What is the difference between a fractional controller and an outsourced controller?
faqs.a: A fractional controller works part-time across several companies. A Satinwood Talent controller is outsourced but full-time, dedicated, and exclusive to your business, embedded in your tools and team, with full ownership of the close, controls, and reporting. You get a controller's seniority without sharing their attention.

faqs.q: What is the difference between outsourced bookkeeping and a controller-level finance hire?
faqs.a: Bookkeeping records transactions; a controller owns the integrity of your numbers. A bookkeeper handles data entry, AP, and AR. A controller owns the close, the controls, the reporting package, and the judgment behind the numbers. Satinwood Talent places controller, FP&A, accounting manager, and senior accountant level talent, not junior bookkeeping.

faqs.q: Can an offshore finance team run our month-end close?
faqs.a: Yes. A senior offshore finance operator can own your full month-end close, reconciliations, customer or retailer settlements, and the monthly reporting pack, working inside your own tools. Satinwood Talent operators run the close end to end with real ownership, with working hours that overlap your day so the close never waits. Most finance work, from the ledger to board reporting, runs remotely.

faqs.q: Why Sri Lanka for finance talent?
faqs.a: Sri Lanka has a deep, internationally trained finance profession, the same people the global firms recruit. Operators are CA Sri Lanka, ACCA, CIMA, or CFA qualified, with real ownership experience inside global banks, Big Four firms, and listed groups. The talent already exists at the standard you want. It is simply in a market where the cost of the same seat is far lower.

faqs.q: How senior are Satinwood Talent's operators?
faqs.a: Controller, FP&A, accounting manager, and senior accountant level. Operators are CA Sri Lanka, ACCA, CIMA, or CFA qualified, with real ownership experience inside global firms, not junior staff relabelled as senior. The average senior operator on our bench has 15 or more years of experience.

faqs.q: What accounting tools do your operators use?
faqs.a: Satinwood Talent operators work in QuickBooks, NetSuite, Xero, and the rest of the modern finance stack, and they use AI tooling where it makes the work faster and sharper. We train every operator on the tools your business already runs on. Judgment first, tools to amplify it.

faqs.q: Are your operators full-time and exclusive to us?
faqs.a: Yes. Each operator is full-time, dedicated, and exclusive to your business, embedded in your tools and team. Not shared, not a pooled queue, not a task marketplace.

faqs.q: Which countries does Satinwood Talent serve?
faqs.a: Satinwood Talent serves growing companies in the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, the United Arab Emirates, and Australia. Operators work hours that overlap your day, agreed up front, so the close never waits.

faqs.q: How fast can you match someone, and is there a trial?
faqs.a: About two weeks from the first call to a hand-selected senior match. Every match starts on a trial period to confirm fit, and if it is not right we replace it. Terms are flexible and rolling, with no long lock-in to get started.

faqs.q: Is my financial data safe with an offshore finance team?
faqs.a: Yes. Operators work on secure, company-issued devices under signed NDAs, with role-based access and documented handling standards. Your financial data is treated as if our own books depended on it.

craft.title: Why the standard is different.
craft.body: Sri Lanka has a deep, internationally trained finance profession, the same people the global firms recruit. We do not just place them. We hold them to a finance-only standard, train them on the tools your business runs on, and give them real ownership.
craft.tagline: Crafted in Ceylon is not a tagline. It is where the standard comes from.

reassurance.title: Built for how finance teams actually work.

faq.title: The things finance leaders ask first.

booking.body: Tell us the seat you need and pick a time below. We will come back with a hand-selected senior match.

coverage.title: Your operator works your hours.
coverage.body: We staff to a [4–6]-hour daily overlap with North American business hours, so the close, the reporting, and ad-hoc requests happen inside your working day — not overnight.

continuity.title: You're never reliant on one person alone.
continuity.body: Every operator is backed by our bench and a documented handover, and if the fit isn't right we replace them within [X] days — with no gap in your close.
